message: The occupied Tart pool failed closed with exit 75 and listed all owning leases; no VM was created.

updates.title: Starting virtual-output proof
updates.message: P02 is active alongside P01: identifying a software-only observation point for remapped output.

updates.title: Starting real input-path proof
updates.message: P01 is active: tracing how RFB-injected keys can be proven to reach Kanata rather than merely reach the guest.

updates.title: TCP readiness hardened

updates.title: Runtime convergence hardened
updates.message: R03 now rejects registered-but-stopped jobs and passed against the real local KeyPath runtime.

updates.title: Adapting to the deployed response
updates.message: The real runtime returned LayerChange instead of CurrentLayerName; the probe now accepts either documented layer-bearing response and still rejects unrelated JSON.

updates.title: Runtime failure contract passed
updates.message: A registered launchd job no longer counts as live unless it reports state = running.

updates.title: TCP failure contracts passed
updates.message: Valid replies pass; open-but-silent and wrong-protocol sockets now fail deterministically.

updates.title: Adjusting for system Python
updates.message: The first test run hit Python compatibility, so R04 stepped back while the test harness is made portable.

updates.title: Runtime liveness check implemented
updates.message: R03 now rejects a registered but stopped Kanata launchd job.

updates.title: Protocol-aware TCP probe implemented
updates.message: R04 now requires a valid CurrentLayerName response instead of merely accepting an open socket.

updates.title: Pairing TCP readiness with runtime proof
updates.message: R04 is active alongside R03 because both postconditions must converge independently.

updates.title: Starting runtime convergence hardening
updates.message: Auditing R03 runtime and R04 TCP checks so a forgiving product retry cannot create a false pass.

updates.title: Development log simplified
updates.message: Removed bubbles and repeated avatars; updates now read as a quiet timestamped transcript.

updates.title: Dashboard composition complete

updates.title: Changing the composition
updates.message: The side rail made the capability map feel cramped. Moving the conversation below preserves the visual breathing room.

updates.title: Wiring the live feed
updates.message: The right rail now turns structured state updates into a running Codex development conversation.

updates.title: Visual language chosen
updates.message: Progress is a fill line, smooth work breathes, retries wobble, and blockers hold a firm red edge.

updates.title: Mapping the experience
updates.message: Separating frontier status from live engineering health so orange never implies that a task is currently running.
